response.justification: Bogdan possesses an excellent technical skill set that perfectly aligns with the core stack, including TypeScript, React, and Node.js, alongside the nice-to-have AI, AWS, and Kubernetes experience. However, he is vastly overqualified for this Junior/Mid-level (Entry Level) role. Having held Senior, Staff, and Founder titles over an 18-year career, he is a poor fit for the scope, responsibilities, and likely salary band of an entry-level position.
strengths: Extensive experience with TypeScript, React, and fullstack Node.js development.
Possesses highly desired nice-to-have skills, including LLM integration, AWS, and Kubernetes.
Strong advocate for clean software architecture, TDD, and software craftsmanship.
concerns: Vastly overqualified for an entry-level role, with over 15 years of professional software development experience.
Likely to have salary expectations that far exceed the budget allocated for a junior/mid-level developer.
High risk of rapid dissatisfaction with the limited scope and responsibilities of an entry-level position.
